title: The Slingshot: An AI Startup Simulation
description:
An interactive, browser-based business simulation for teaching entrepreneurship and innovation management. Players run an AI startup through sixteen quarters of strategic decisions — funding, hiring, competition, market opportunities, milestones and pivots — learning to make consequential decisions under uncertainty through experience, failure and replay.

The Slingshot runs in any modern browser as a single self-contained HTML file, with no installation, accounts or server. Version 2 adds a Market Opportunity Navigator (based on Gruber and Tal's Where to Play), a gentler Seed mode, a Token Spend mechanic, optional anonymous Trajectory benchmarking, and milestone choices.

Developed as part of the ESRC-funded project “Profiting from Science: The Development and Valuation of Artificial Intelligence New Ventures and Engagement with the Science Base” (Grant Reference: ES/X003949/1). Licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

creators.name: Salter, Ammon
